briefdescription.para: Given an NMT boot error status

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_es2str() is called with the status
Then a pointer to an appropriate string describing the status is returned

briefdescription.para: Given an unknown NMT boot error status

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_es2str() is called with the status
Then a pointer to "Unknown error status" string is returned

briefdescription.para: Given N/A

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_sizeof() is called
Then the platform-dependent size of the NMT service object is returned

briefdescription.para: Given N/A

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_alignof() is called
Then the platform-dependent alignment of the NMT service object is returned

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016) with less than maximum number of entries

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t), the object dictionary contains the Slave Assignment object (0x1f81) with at least one slave in the network list

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time (0x1016), the Producer Heartbeat Time (0x1017), the NMT Start-up (0x1f80), the Slave Assignment (0x1f81) and the Request NMT (0x1f82) objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to 0 bytes

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() calls get_errc() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to only allocate the NMT service instance

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_chk_dev() calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_dev_write_dcf() calls get_errc() calls mem_free() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to only allocate the NMT service instance, the concise DCF backups for application parameters and communication parameters

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_chk_dev() calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_dev_write_dcf() calls co_nmt_srv_init() calls co_nmt_srv_fini() calls get_errc() calls mem_free() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to only allocate the NMT service instance, DCFs for application/communication parameters and the default services instances

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_chk_dev() calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_dev_write_dcf() calls co_nmt_srv_init() calls co_nmt_srv_fini() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_destroy() calls get_errc() calls mem_free() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to only allocate the NMT service instance, DCFs for application/communication parameters, the default services instances and a receiver for NMT messages

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_chk_dev() calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_dev_write_dcf() calls co_nmt_srv_init() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_destroy() calls can_recv_set_func() calls get_errc() calls mem_free() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to only allocate the NMT service instance, DCFs for application/communication parameters, the default services instances, a receiver for NMT messages and a receiver for NMT error control messages

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_chk_dev() calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_dev_write_dcf() calls co_nmt_srv_init() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_destroy() calls can_recv_set_func() calls can_timer_create() calls get_errc() calls mem_free() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to only allocate the NMT service instance, DCFs for application/communication parameters, the default services instances, all NMT receivers and a timer for life guarding/heartbeat production

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_chk_dev() calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_dev_write_dcf() calls co_nmt_srv_init() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_destroy() calls can_recv_set_func() calls can_timer_create() calls can_timer_set_func() calls can_timer_destroy() calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_nmt_rdn_create() if LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls memset() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_create() calls get_errc() calls mem_free() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to only allocate the NMT service instance, DCFs for application/communication parameters, the default services instances, all NMT receivers, a timer for life guarding/heartbeat production and the NMT redundancy manager service instance

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_chk_dev() calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_dev_write_dcf() calls co_nmt_srv_init() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_destroy() calls can_recv_set_func() calls can_timer_create() calls can_timer_set_func() calls can_timer_destroy() calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_nmt_rdn_create() if LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls memset() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_create() calls get_errc() calls mem_free() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to only allocate the NMT service instance, DCFs for application/communication parameters, the default services instances, all NMT receivers and a timer for life guarding/heartbeat production; the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016) with at least one entry

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_chk_dev() calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_dev_write_dcf() calls co_nmt_srv_init() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_destroy() calls can_recv_set_func() calls can_timer_create() calls can_timer_set_func() calls can_timer_destroy() calls co_dev_find_obj() if LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls memset() if LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls co_dev_find_sub() if LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls co_nmt_hb_create() calls get_errc() calls mem_free() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to only allocate the NMT service instance, DCFs for application/communication parameters, the default services instances, all NMT receivers, a timer for life guarding/heartbeat production, the NMT redundancy manager service instance and a timer for sending buffered NMT messages

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

Then a null pointer is returned, NMT service is not created and the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM calls mem_alloc() calls can_net_get_alloc() calls co_nmt_alignof() calls co_nmt_sizeof() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_chk_dev() calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_dev_write_dcf() calls co_nmt_srv_init() calls can_recv_create() calls can_recv_destroy() calls can_recv_set_func() calls can_timer_create() calls can_timer_set_func() calls can_timer_destroy() calls co_dev_find_obj() if LELY_NO_MALLOC: calls memset() if !LELY_NO_CO_ECSS_REDUNDANCY: calls co_nmt_rdn_create() calls get_errc() calls mem_free() calls set_errc()

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to exactly allocate the NMT service and all required objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

briefdescription.para: Given initialized device (co_dev_t) and network (can_net_t) with a memory allocator limited to exactly allocate the NMT service and all required objects; the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016) with the maximum number of entries

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_create() is called with pointers to the network and the device

briefdescription.para: Given N/A

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_destroy() is called with a null NMT service pointer
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_destroy() is called with a pointer to the service

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured with the Consumer Heartbeat Time (0x1016), the Producer Heartbeat Time (0x1017), the NMT Start-up (0x1f80), the Slave Assignment (0x1f81) and the Request NMT (0x1f82) objects in the object dictionary

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_destroy() is called with a pointer to the service

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an NMT service (co_nmt_t) created on a network with an allocator

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_alloc() is called
Then a pointer to the allocator (alloc_t) is returned calls can_net_get_alloc()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an NMT service (co_nmt_t) created on a network

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_net() is called
Then a pointer to the network (can_net_t) is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an NMT service (co_nmt_t) created on a device

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_dev() is called
Then a pointer to the device (co_dev_t) is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_cs_ind() is called with no addresses to store the indication function and user-specified data pointers at
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_cs_ind() is called with an address to store the indication function pointer and an address to store user-specified data pointer
Then both pointers are set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_cs_ind() is called with a pointer to an indication function and a pointer to user-specified data
Then the indication function and the user-specified data pointers are set in the NMT service

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_hb_ind() is called with no addresses to store the indication function and user-specified data pointers at
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_hb_ind() is called with an address to store the indication function pointer and an address to store user-specified data pointer
Then the indication function pointer is set to a non-null pointer and the user-specified data pointer is set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_hb_ind() is called with a pointer to an indication function and a pointer to user-specified data
Then the indication function and the user-specified data pointers are set in the NMT service

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_hb_ind() is called with a null indication function pointer and a null user-specified data pointer
Then the indication function pointer is set to a non-null pointer and the user-specified data pointer is set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_st_ind() is called with no addresses to store the indication function and user-specified data pointers at
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_st_ind() is called with an address to store the indication function pointer and an address to store user-specified data pointer
Then the indication function pointer is set to a non-null pointer and the user-specified data pointer is set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_st_ind() is called with a pointer to an indication function and a pointer to user-specified data
Then the indication function and the user-specified data pointers are set in the NMT service

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_st_ind() is called with a null indication function pointer and a null user-specified data pointer
Then the indication function pointer is set to a non-null pointer and the user-specified data pointer is set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_dn_ind() is called with no addresses to store the indication function and user-specified data pointers at
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_dn_ind() is called with an address to store the indication function pointer and an address to store user-specified data pointer
Then both pointers are set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_dn_ind() is called with a pointer to an indication function and a pointer to user-specified data
Then the indication function and the user-specified data pointers are set in the NMT service

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_up_ind() is called with no addresses to store the indication function and user-specified data pointers at
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_up_ind() is called with an address to store the indication function pointer and an address to store user-specified data pointer
Then both pointers are set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_up_ind() is called with a pointer to an indication function and a pointer to user-specified data
Then the indication function and the user-specified data pointers are set in the NMT service

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_sync_ind() is called with no addresses to store the indication function and user-specified data pointers at
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_sync_ind() is called with an address to store the indication function pointer and an address to store user-specified data pointer
Then both pointers are set to a null pointer

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_sync_ind() is called with a pointer to an indication function and a pointer to user-specified data
Then the indication function and the user-specified data pointers are set in the NMT service

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_id() is called
Then the pending Node-ID is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_id() is called with a Node-ID equal to 0
Then -1 is returned, the error number it set to ERRNUM_INVAL

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_id() is called with a Node-ID over the maximum value
Then -1 is returned, the error number it set to ERRNUM_INVAL

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_id() is called with the unconfigured Node-ID (255)
Then 0 is returned, the pending Node-ID is set to the unconfigured Node-ID

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_id() is called with a Node-ID
Then 0 is returned, the pending Node-ID is set

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_st() is called
Then the current state of the NMT service is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) before the initial reset

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_is_master() is called
Then 0 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_is_master() is called
Then 0 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_is_master() is called
Then 1 is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_get_timeout() is called
Then the default SDO timeout is returned

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_set_timeout() is called with a timeout value
Then the default SDO timeout is set

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_st() is called with a Node-ID equal to 0 and any NMT state
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_st() is called with a Node-ID over the maximum value and any NMT state
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_st() is called with a Node-ID and any NMT state
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with any NMT command specifier and any Node-ID
Then -1 is returned, the error number it set to ERRNUM_PERM, the request is not sent calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with an invalid NMT command specifier and a Node-ID
Then -1 is returned, the error number it set to ERRNUM_INVAL, the request is not sent calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with an NMT command specifier and a Node-ID over the maximum value
Then -1 is returned, the error number it set to ERRNUM_INVAL, the request is not sent calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with an NMT command specifier and master's Node-ID
Then 0 is returned, the local request is issued and master transitions to the state defined by the command calls co_dev_get_id() calls co_nmt_cs_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master, the NMT service's CAN frame buffer is full

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with an NMT command specifier and a Node-ID
Then -1 is returned, the error number is set to ERRNUM_NOMEM, the request is not sent calls co_dev_get_id() calls can_buf_write()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with an NMT command specifier and a Node-ID, but sending the CAN message failed
Then -1 is returned, the request is not sent; the request is resent on the next call to co_nmt_cs_req() along with the next request

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master, the object dictionary contains the NMT Inhibit Time object (0x102a) with non-zero value

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called (at least once) with an NMT command specifier and a Node-ID
Then 0 is returned, the request(s) are not sent immediately; each request is sent after the inhibit time has passed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with an NMT command specifier and a Node-ID

Then 0 is returned, the request is sent calls co_dev_get_id() calls can_buf_write() calls co_dev_get_val_u16() calls can_timer_stop() calls can_buf_peek() calls can_net_send() calls can_buf_read() calls can_net_get_time() calls timespec_add_usec()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with a slave node that has booted

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with an NMT command specifier and a Node-ID

Then 0 is returned, the request is sent calls co_dev_get_id() calls can_buf_write() calls co_dev_get_val_u16() calls can_timer_stop() calls can_buf_peek() calls can_net_send() calls can_buf_read() calls can_net_get_time() calls timespec_add_usec()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with an NMT command specifier and a Node-ID equal to 0 (all nodes)

Then 0 is returned, the request is sent calls co_dev_get_id() calls can_buf_write() calls co_dev_get_val_u16() calls can_timer_stop() calls can_buf_peek() calls can_net_send() calls can_buf_read() calls can_net_get_time() calls timespec_add_usec()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with at least one node that has booted

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_req() is called with an NMT command specifier and a Node-ID equal to 0 (all nodes)

Then 0 is returned, the request is sent calls co_dev_get_id() calls can_buf_write() calls co_dev_get_val_u16() calls can_timer_stop() calls can_buf_peek() calls can_net_send() calls can_buf_read() calls can_net_get_time() calls timespec_add_usec()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with any Node-ID
Then -1 is returned, the error number it set to ERRNUM_PERM calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with a Node-ID over the maximum value
Then -1 is returned, the error number it set to ERRNUM_INVAL calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with master's Node-ID
Then 1 is returned calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master, the NMT service hasn't finished the boot-up procedure

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with master's Node-ID
Then 0 is returned calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master without any slaves

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with Node-ID equal to 0
Then 1 is returned calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with a non-mandatory slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with Node-ID equal to 0
Then 1 is returned calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with at least one mandatory slave that hasn't booted

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with Node-ID equal to 0
Then 0 is returned calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with a mandatory slave that has booted

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with Node-ID equal to 0
Then 1 is returned calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with a slave that hasn't booted

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with the slave's Node-ID
Then 0 is returned calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with a slave that has booted

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_chk_bootup() is called with the slave's Node-ID
Then 1 is returned calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with an invalid NMT command specifier
Then -1 is returned, the error number is set to ERRNUM_INVAL, nothing is changed calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with any NMT command specifier other than 'reset node'
Then 0 is returned, nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset node' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the object dictionary contains objects in the application parameters area (0x2000-0x9fff)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset node' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) with an unconfigured Node-ID

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset node' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a partially booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) in the NMT 'reset communication' sub-state with an unconfigured Node-ID

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset node' command specifier after setting a proper Node-ID

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a partially booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) in the NMT 'reset communication' sub-state

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset communication' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a partially booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) in the NMT 'reset communication' sub-state

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with any NMT command specifier other than 'reset node' or 'reset communication'
Then 0 is returned, nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) in the NMT 'pre-operational' state

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'start' command specifier
Then 0 is returned, the service transitions to the NMT 'start' state calls diag() calls co_nmt_srv_set() calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) in the NMT 'pre-operational' state

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'stop' command specifier
Then 0 is returned, the service transitions to the NMT 'stop' state calls co_nmt_srv_set() calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) in the NMT 'pre-operational' state

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset node' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) in the NMT 'pre-operational' state

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset communication' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a booted NMT service (co_nmt_t) in the NMT 'pre-operational' state

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'enter pre-operational' command specifier
Then 0 is returned, nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'enter pre-operational' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'stop' command specifier
Then 0 is returned, the service transitions to the NMT 'stop' state calls co_nmt_srv_set() calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset node' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the object dictionary contains objects in the communication parameters area (0x1000-0x1fff)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset communication' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the object dictionary contains objects with the CO_OBJ_FLAGS_VAL_NODEID flag set in the communication parameters area (0x1000-0x1fff) and there is a new pending Node-ID set

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset communication' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'start' command specifier
Then 0 is returned, nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a stopped NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'enter pre-operational' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a stopped NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'start' command specifier
Then 0 is returned, the service transitions to the NMT 'start' state calls diag() calls co_nmt_srv_set() calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a stopped NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset node' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a stopped NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset communication' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a stopped NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'stop' command specifier
Then 0 is returned, nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a initialized NMT service (co_nmt_t) with no NMT command indication function

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_cs_ind() is called with the NMT 'reset node' command specifier and then with the NMT 'stop' command specifier

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the object dictionary contains the Error Behavior object (0x1029) containing the Communication Error entry (0x01) with the value 0x00; the node is in the operational state

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_comm_err_ind() is called
Then the node transitions to the NMT 'pre-operational' state calls co_dev_get_val_u8() calls co_nmt_get_st() calls co_nmt_cs_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the object dictionary contains the Error Behavior object (0x1029) containing the Communication Error entry (0x01) with the value 0x00; the node is not in the operational state

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_comm_err_ind() is called
Then nothing is changed calls co_dev_get_val_u8() calls co_nmt_get_st() calls co_nmt_cs_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the object dictionary contains the Error Behavior object (0x1029) containing the Communication Error entry (0x01) with the value 0x01

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_comm_err_ind() is called
Then nothing is changed calls co_dev_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the object dictionary contains the Error Behavior object (0x1029) containing the Communication Error entry (0x01) with the value 0x02

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_comm_err_ind() is called
Then the node transitions to the NMT 'stop' state calls co_dev_get_val_u8() calls co_nmt_cs_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_node_err_ind() is called with any Node-ID
Then -1 is returned and the error number is set to ERRNUM_PERM calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_node_err_ind() is called with a Node-ID equal to 0
Then -1 is returned and the error number is set to ERRNUM_INVAL calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_node_err_ind() is called with a Node-ID larger than CO_NUM_NODES
Then -1 is returned and the error number is set to ERRNUM_INVAL calls set_errnum()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_node_err_ind() is called with a Node-ID of an unknown slave
Then 0 is returned, nothing is changed calls co_dev_get_val_u32()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with 0x40 bit set in the NMT Startup object (0x1f80)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_node_err_ind() is called with a Node-ID of a mandatory slave
Then 0 is returned, the NMT 'stop' command is sent to all nodes (Node-ID = 0) and the master transitions to the NMT 'stop' state calls co_dev_get_val_u32() calls co_nmt_cs_req() calls co_nmt_cs_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with 0x10 bit set in the NMT Startup object (0x1f80)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_node_err_ind() is called with a Node-ID of a mandatory slave
Then 0 is returned, the NMT 'reset node' command is sent to all nodes (Node-ID = 0) and the master resets itself calls co_dev_get_val_u32() calls co_nmt_cs_req() calls co_nmt_cs_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master, no additional bits in the NMT Startup object (0x1f80) are set

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_node_err_ind() is called with a Node-ID of a mandatory slave
Then 0 is returned, the NMT 'reset node' command is sent to the slave calls co_dev_get_val_u32() calls co_nmt_cs_req()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_node_err_ind() is called with a Node-ID of a non-mandatory slave
Then 0 is returned, the NMT 'reset node' command is sent to the slave calls co_dev_get_val_u32() calls co_nmt_cs_req()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary does not contain the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016)

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device and with other arguments having any value
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_OBJ is returned, the device is not modified calls co_dev_find_obj()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016), but without any sub-objects

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device and with other arguments having any correct value
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB is returned, the device is not modified calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016) with the "Highest sub-index supported" sub-object (0x00) set to a value greater than zero, but without any other sub-objects (a malformed object).

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device and with other arguments having any correct value
Then CO_SDO_AC_NO_SUB is returned, the device is not modified calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_obj_find_sub()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016)

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device, an incorrect Node-ID (zero) and any correct heartbeat time
Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_LO is returned, the device is not modified calls co_dev_find_obj()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016)

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device, an incorrect Node-ID (larger than CO_NUM_NODES) and any correct heartbeat time
Then CO_SDO_AC_PARAM_HI is returned, the device is not modified calls co_dev_find_obj()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016) with multiple Consumer Heartbeat Time sub-objects, one containing an incorrect Node-ID (zero)

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device, a selected Node-ID and a heartbeat time
Then 0 is returned and the requested value is assigned to the sub-object with an incorrect Node-ID calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_obj_find_sub() calls co_sub_dn_ind_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016) with multiple Consumer Heartbeat Time sub-objects, one containing an incorrect Node-ID (larger than CO_NUM_NODES)

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device, a selected Node-ID and a heartbeat time
Then 0 is returned and the requested value is assigned to the sub-object with an incorrect Node-ID calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_obj_find_sub() calls co_sub_dn_ind_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016) with multiple Consumer Heartbeat Time sub-objects, one containing a selected Node-ID

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device, the selected Node-ID and a heartbeat time

Then 0 is returned and the Consumer Heartbeat Time sub-object containing the selected Node-ID is updated calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_obj_find_sub() calls co_sub_dn_ind_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016) with multiple Consumer Heartbeat Time sub-objects, one containing a selected Node-ID

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device, the selected Node-ID and a heartbeat time equal 0

Then 0 is returned and the Consumer Heartbeat Time sub-object containing the selected Node-ID is marked as "unused" (zero) calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_obj_find_sub() calls co_sub_dn_ind_val()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to an initialized device (co_dev_t), the object dictionary contains the Consumer Heartbeat Time object (0x1016) with multiple Consumer Heartbeat Time sub-objects, none containing a selected Node-ID

detaileddescription.para: When co_dev_cfg_hb() is called with a pointer to the device, the selected Node-ID and a heartbeat time equal 0
Then 0 is returned and sub-objects are not modified calls co_dev_find_obj() calls co_obj_get_val_u8() calls co_obj_find_sub()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_err() is called with an emergency error code equal to zero, any error register value and any manufacturer-specific error code
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the EMCY service is not initialized

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_err() is called with a non-zero emergency error code, any error register value and any manufacturer-specific error code
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the EMCY service is initialized and running, the object dictionary contains the Error Register object (0x1001) and the Pre-defined Error Field object (0x1003) with no errors recorded

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_err() is called with a non-zero emergency error code, any error register value and any manufacturer-specific error code
Then the error register value is set in the Error Register object and the emergency error code is added to the Pre-defined Error Field object calls co_emcy_push()

briefdescription.para: Given a pointer to a started NMT service (co_nmt_t), the object dictionary contains the Error Behavior object (0x1029)

detaileddescription.para: When co_nmt_on_err() is called with a communication error (0x81xx) emergency error code, any error register value and any manufacturer-specific error code
Then the behaviour specified by the Error Behavior object is invoked calls co_nmt_comm_err_ind()

sectiondef.header: NMT service: received NMT message processing

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT message is received
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT message with an incorrect message length is received
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT message with a Node-ID equal to zero (all nodes) is received
Then the command is processed, the node transitions to the requested state

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT message with other node's Node-ID is received
Then nothing is changed calls co_dev_get_id()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT slave

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT message with the node's Node-ID is received
Then the command is processed, the node transitions to the requested state calls co_dev_get_id()

sectiondef.header: NMT service: received NMT error control message processing

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT error control message with a Node-ID equal to zero is received
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT error control message with an incorrect message length is received
Then nothing is changed

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with a configured slave node

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT boot-up message from the slave node is received

Then the NMT state change indication function is invoked with the slave's Node-ID, CO_NMT_ST_BOOTUP state and a null user-specified data pointer, the receipt of a boot-up message from the slave is denoted calls co_nmt_st_ind()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) configured as NMT master with a slave node

detaileddescription.para: When an NMT hearbeat message from the slave node is received
Then nothing is changed

sectiondef.header: NMT service: NMT error control timer

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the heartbeat producer service set up

detaileddescription.para: When the producer heartbeat time passes
Then the heartbeat message with the current state of the NMT service is sent calls can_net_send()

briefdescription.para: Given a started NMT service (co_nmt_t) with the heartbeat producer service set up, but the producer heartbeat time is zeroed after start

detaileddescription.para: When the producer heartbeat time passes
Then no heartbeat message is sent if !LELY_NO_CO_NG: calls diag()

briefdescription.para: This file is part of the CANopen Library Unit Test Suite.

detaileddescription.para:
2021 N7 Space Sp. z o.o.
Unit Test Suite was developed under a programme of, and funded by, the European Space Agency.

You may obtain a copy of the License at http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0 Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
